_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: tumors treated with ADU-S100 plus anti–PD-1 showed significantly increased apoptotic cell death compared with those treated with ADU-S100 alone
details: In combination with ADU-S100, resulted in significantly smaller tumors compared to ADU-S100 alone and enhanced apoptotic cell death
